VERIFY 1.notes: Ran npm run build + npm test after rebase onto origin/feat/install-ux-and-docs (preserved 2 upstream review commits). Full suite green.

VERIFY 2.notes: npm run build + npm test after rebase onto origin/main. All Phase 2 tasks done. Pushed to origin/feat/install-ux-and-docs.

tasks.title: Diagnose & fix Codex config.toml quoting + silent provider fallback (#115)
tasks.notes: Added throw on unknown provider string (getProvider) + TOML validity test. Original reporter's malformed bytes likely from raw PowerShell here-string — composePermissionConfig path retained (per NOTE 1) since root cause couldn't be reproduced with mocked fs; deferred to actual Windows install smoke test.

tasks.title: Fix statusline not clearing after remove_member (#39)
tasks.notes: writeStatusline() now clears statusline.txt and resets statusline-state.json on zero agents. Added tests/statusline.test.ts using APRA_FLEET_DATA_DIR to sandbox real fs.

tasks.title: Switch claude resume from -r <id> to -c (#108)
tasks.notes: ClaudeProvider.buildPromptCommand emits ' -c' when sessionId is present; buildResumeFlag helper retained for Gemini. Tests updated in tests/providers.test.ts.

verify.notes: Build clean (tsc), 641 tests passed / 3 skipped / 0 failed after rebase onto origin. Pushed to origin/feat/install-ux-and-docs.

tasks.title: --skill default = all, add none/--no-skill (#139)
tasks.notes: Default (no flag) = all; supports all|fleet|pm|none values; --no-skill synonym for none; bare --skill = all (backwards-compat); unknown --skill=X errors; 4 new matrix tests in tests/install-multi-provider.test.ts.

tasks.title: --force flag + busy prompt (#96)
tasks.notes: isApraFleetRunning uses pgrep -x (exact name, per NOTE 2) on Linux/macOS; tasklist on Windows. killApraFleet uses pkill -x / taskkill /F /IM. Guard fires only in SEA mode. --force kills server + waits 500ms; appends restart note to success message. Unknown flags now error. _setSeaOverride/_setManifestOverride exported for test isolation. 14 tests in tests/install-force.test.ts.

tasks.title: --help/-h guard in install command (#142)
tasks.notes: Early exit at top of runInstall before any side effects. Prints install-specific usage and exits 0. 2 tests verify no writeFileSync calls.

verify.notes: npm run build (tsc clean) + npm test: 661 passed / 3 skipped / 0 failed (42 files). Pushed to origin/feat/install-ux-and-docs.
